contested_replacements.primary_replacement_text: Each party's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall not exceed $150,000.
contested_replacements.critic_objection: The primary's replacement drops the mutual carve-out for gross negligence that the playbook requires alongside the cap.
contested_replacements.critic_suggested_replacement: Each party's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall not exceed $150,000, except in cases of gross negligence or willful misconduct.
